name: DANAHER CORP /DE/
summary: Danaher Corporation is a science and technology company that develops and manufactures products and services for professional, medical, industrial, and commercial markets. The company operates through multiple segments and is engaged in an acquisition of Masimo Corporation. Danaher focuses on life sciences, diagnostics, and environmental and applied solutions, offering analytical instruments, consumables, software, and services to customers worldwide.

products.name: Analytical Instruments
products.description: Scientific instruments used in life sciences, diagnostics, and environmental applications.

products.name: Consumables
products.description: Consumable products supporting laboratory and diagnostic workflows.

products.name: Software Solutions
products.description: Software products supporting scientific and industrial operations.

products.name: Services
products.description: Professional and technical services supporting Danaher's product lines.
